channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 2 com severidade Crítica
• 18 com severidade Alta
• 10 novas CVEs
• 5 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 Servidores NGINX sob ataque contra a CVE-2026-42945 - CISO Advisor
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata a vulnerabilidade CVE-2026-42945 associada a Nginx. Vale consultar o link para verificar impacto, versões afetadas e orientações de correção.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiiAFBVV95cUxQdGc1Tk5oWlpuc0l3STd0bEpTRnJpQnI5Q1UwQ2RfU3JNN3Q4N3hEUzR5WTZFWE4xaFlORVNRME56MVBYSXlBVWp1bElJczNUMUhWWHVMNXZOc3Q2NVJrWnJEVXpiVktmek5pYm93aFhhM2xjUUdidVlKVlhRNnJObHVDRHVDX2Fn?oc=5
 
💣 Hackers Actively Exploiting Critical NGINX RCE Vulnerability in the Wild - CyberSecurityNews
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a Nginx, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
💣 Critical bug in F5 NGINX actively exploited | news | SC Media - SC Media
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Nginx. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMifEFVX3lxTE5zdEVTNzgxeEwwazUzbTRuU1FpaGF1MDFPaDRfQmFDWkxQYU5VQ0ExdjhwcHFXLWduc0ZaRTlwVlluM1BIRGNTUmZoUVlESEo1RGV0NU44cUFlVmxIWnZtTTFkYWs0eGc3N2djVnMydXhKaVZRbDhOWm8xaDk?oc=5
 
📰 More Memory, Less Effort: Configuring Memory Tiering in VCF 9.1
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
Introduction Memory Tiering in VCF 9.1 lets you extend your memory capacity by using high-speed NVMe devices as a Tier 1 layer alongside DRAM (Tier 0), and the business case is compelling. You can consolidate more VMs per host, lower your TCO by delaying costly DRAM upgrades, and consume existing resources far more efficiently.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/05/19/more-memory-less-effort-configuring-memory-tiering-in-vcf-9-1/
 
📰 New Gentlemen Ransomware Attacks Multiple Platforms Including ESXi and NAS - cyberpress.org
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a ESX, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiaEFVX3lxTE9xMnhBNFFPbGc4a3ZqMGFSNWcwYW9qYmtTUkx2V0JQSTkxVEFVb0ZQa3N6UEpQcDZJemsyOWxBbnV4a0RsWHdzWXV4OFZDNUlwWl84aFVVSWdMR0RwY09TUkJSSWtSYVhl?oc=5
 
📰 Ivanti, Fortinet, SAP e VMware corrigem falhas críticas de RCE - Wintech.pt
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a VMware, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisgFBVV95cUxPTHhicDhReXJWWG5oMjZrdWhfd0YzR01pWlo3RXlvaDhpVjlEMlZQckNSMUxKRkMwNFFJbzJiNm5FNVp3N3NZR1NfR3hxdlNLeUxuUGY2cElfWktIeGVMY2JIUV9FVkt6TTVjdFlvZXBNaVYyUVJlcVFGX2dDdzZWVWhmZUJCc19YUVZIV0h2ZGNyZGdMOHNvT2JCZWQ0ZFpmdVU1V18zdVlIWHRGanBmdWpR?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 DirtyDecrypt PoC Released for Linux Kernel CVE-2026-31635 LPE Vulnerability
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Proof-of-concept (PoC) exploit code has now been released for a recently patched security flaw in the Linux kernel that could allow for local privilege escalation (LPE). Dubbed DirtyDecrypt (aka DirtyCBC), the vulnerability was discovered and reported by the Zellic and V12 security team on May 9, 2026, only to be informed by the maintainers that it was a duplicate of a vulnerability that had
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/dirtydecrypt-poc-released-for-linux.html
 
💣 SEPPMail Secure E-Mail Gateway Vulnerabilities Enable RCE and Mail Traffic Access
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Critical security vulnerabilities have been disclosed in SEPPMail Secure E-Mail Gateway, an enterprise-grade email security solution, that could be exploited to achieve remote code execution and enable an attacker to read arbitrary mails from the virtual appliance. "These vulnerabilities could have been exploited to read all mail traffic or as an entry vector into the internal network,"
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/seppmail-secure-e-mail-gateway.html
 
💣 Drupal to Release Urgent Core Security Updates on May 20, Sites Told to Prepare
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Drupal has issued an alert stating that it intends to release a "core security release" for all supported branches on May 20, 2026, from 5-9 p.m. "The Drupal Security Team urges you to reserve time for core updates at that time because exploits might be developed within hours or days," the maintainers of the PHP-based content management system (CMS) said.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/drupal-to-release-urgent-core-security.html
 
📰 Critical Microsoft Vulnerabilities Doubled: From Exposure to Escalation
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Microsoft's total vulnerability count stayed steady in 2025, but critical flaws surged year over year. BeyondTrust breaks down why attackers are increasingly focused on privilege escalation and identity abuse.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/critical-microsoft-vulnerabilities-doubled-from-exposure-to-escalation/
 
📰 Leaked Shai-Hulud malware fuels new npm infostealer campaign
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The Shai-Hulud malware leaked last week is now used in new attacks on the Node Package Manager (npm) index, as infected packages emerged over the weekend.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/leaked-shai-hulud-malware-fuels-new-npm-infostealer-campaign/
 
📰 Grafana says stolen GitHub token let hackers steal codebase
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Grafana Labs disclosed that hackers have downloaded its source code after breaching its GitHub environment using a stolen access token.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/grafana-says-stolen-github-token-let-hackers-steal-codebase/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-42822 - Azure
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 10.0
Resumo:
Improper authentication in Azure Local Disconnected Operations allows an unauthorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42822
 
🚨 CVE-2025-15609 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
The Fortis for WooCommerce WordPress plugin before 1.3.1 may leak sensitive API keys to unauthenticated attackers, allowing them to query Fortis' API and retrieve sensitive customer information, like past orders, PII, etc.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-15609
 
🚨 USN-8254-3: Linux kernel (NVIDIA Tegra) vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Several security issues were discovered in the Linux kernel. An attacker could possibly use these to compromise the system. This update corrects flaws in the following subsystems: - Network drivers; - NVME drivers; - Netfilter; (CVE-2026-23112, CVE-2026-23231, CVE-2026-23273)
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8254-3
 
🚨 USN-8275-1: Linux kernel (Xilinx ZynqMP) vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Stonejiajia, Shir Tamari and Sagi Tzadik discovered that the OverlayFS implementation in the Ubuntu Linux kernel did not properly perform permission checks in certain situations. A local attacker could possibly use this to gain elevated privileges. (CVE-2023-2640) Shir Tamari and Sagi Tzadik discovered that the OverlayFS implementation in the Ubuntu Linux kernel did not properly perform permission checks in certain s...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8275-1
 
🚨 CVE-2026-1631 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.4
Resumo:
The Feeds for YouTube (YouTube video, channel, and gallery plugin) WordPress plugin before 2.6.4 is vulnerable to unauthorized modification of the Feeds for YouTube (YouTube video, channel, and gallery plugin) WordPress plugin before 2.6.4's license key due to a missing capability check on the 'actions' function. This makes it possible for subscribers and above delete the license key.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-1631
 
💣 Hackers Exploit Entra ID Accounts to Steal Microsoft 365, Azure Data - gbhackers.com
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Office. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFBTMUlhcjhoeEQ5N1ZDTUU5bmxET0JvaWtPOFg4dGVnZDB5X1p1b1Z2dXBqcExBaFJvcHFyQ0pSLTRfU0dfM3B6SUZwRFhvckh0YjdXdzZCZ3BZN0E?oc=5
 
📰 Critical Wordpress Plugin Vulnerability Exposes Websites to Authentication Bypass Attacks - CyberSecurityNews
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a WordPress, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 Microsoft Exchange Zero-Day Under Attack, No Patch Available - Dark Reading
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a Office, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikgFBVV95cUxQYjhpNXlxVkVfVzUtUEV0NFJRc1Q3ZkZrdl9Nc192a3ZNcTkzM0d6X3hPdU8tOGNYNmZCWThOY3hoRzdTSW92bWhYNWo5aXVnc1JXWUJtZ2dVSzhWZGh0MWM1YVdLMXRFMUhjbFctN3JTSGUxWlFEMzJIb20zNklWY2dtcG5CQlpBVzJaS1dWUWRXdw?oc=5
 
📰 Researcher claims Microsoft silently patched Azure Backup for AKS vulnerability | brief | SC Media - SC Media
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a Azure, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirgFBVV95cUxOVGVZYnloeS1Xeld4RkdOeXNtQXVKVDhFQmwtYWdLcXc2M1dYaWstVjdvYjExbFkxdEFiYjhHalJEYXVhVjBrVmRoOElfVlM4VzlIanVPSjVaR3BDdkpLWXNya3NsQ2JfZUF5aHBvbUZ4dXNvYk9uZVF4UE9vQlBKRnFMclVQdFdqTkJwRTVUUmdxVnFReVhGTUp3N0JxZl9lMS1LRm1hdE5FMElHY2c?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias dos dias 18/05/2026 e 19/05/2026.
